title: Robotics @ XIAOMI
excerpt: Breaking the data barrier. Scaling robot policy models with embodiment-free pre-training.
content_html:
Breaking the data barrier. Scaling robot policy models with embodiment-free pre-training.

Foundation models in language and vision keep moving the frontier by riding empirical scaling laws: capability tracks data, parameters, and compute. Robotics has missed out. Large-scale, high-quality data is hard to come by, and that scarcity, more than anything else, has capped how far policy models could scale. What robots can do under genuinely large-scale training remained largely an open question. We take a step toward answering it. Xiaomi-Robotics-1 combines large-scale embodiment-free (UMI) pre-training with a modest amount of real-robot data in a post-training stage. We study how the model behaves as it scales.

Data

Everything Xiaomi-Robotics-1 can do starts from data. For pre-training, we use 100,000 hours of embodiment-free (UMI) trajectories spanning more than 1,700 scenarios (household, commercial premises, industrial sites, and outdoor spaces), covering a diverse range of tasks. We develop a scalable auto-labeling pipeline that first divides trajectories into fixed-length segments and then annotates each segment with language descriptions of scene state transitions.

For post-training, we leverage cross-embodiment datasets containing in-house robot data, filtered open-sourced robot data, and a set of high-quality UMI data. For the in-house data, we collected over 7,200 hours of real-robot data in real homes, covering tasks like tidying a sofa, sorting a shoe cabinet, and putting away kitchenware. The UMI data are manually annotated with temporal segments and instruction prompts, which differ from the auto-labeled state-transition descriptions used in the pre-training data.

Method

Following the training paradigm of LLMs, the training of Xiaomi-Robotics-1 consists of two stages: pre-training and post-training. The first stage learns general representations for action generation from large-scale UMI data, while the post-training stage aligns the model with real robot embodiments and instruction-following capabilities.

Pre-training is about breadth: exposing the model to as much of the real world as possible. We use the embodiment-free UMI data described above, which spans a broad range of environments and tasks. At this scale, manual labeling is infeasible. Thus, we built an automatic annotation pipeline powered by a strong vision-language model. Long videos are split into fixed-length clips, and the VLM describes the state transition of grippers and interacting objects within each clip. The result is a large-scale corpus of real-world manipulation trajectories, each annotated with precise language descriptions. These allow the model to learn action generation that drives the scene toward the state transitions described by the language.

An encouraging finding is that pre-training shows a clean scaling behavior: as data and model size grow, validation action error steadily decreases.

Post-training aims to align the strong action-generation capabilities acquired from pre-training with real robot embodiments and natural-language instruction following along two axes. Embodiment alignment uses high-quality cross-embodiment real-robot data to map the general action-generation ability onto actual robots. Instruction alignment shifts the model from "generating actions given a description of scene state transitions" to "understanding a natural-language instruction and executing it directly."

After post-training, Xiaomi-Robotics-1 can be used out-of-the-box to perform a wide range of mobile manipulation tasks in the real world. We evaluate the post-trained model in unseen environments with unseen object instances to understand whether the scaling behaviors from pre-training can transfer to real-robot performance after post-training.

The answer is yes. As we increase the amount of pre-training data and model size, real-robot success rate rises steadily and predictably. That is, a stronger pre-trained model yields better real-robot performance. The scaling gains show no signs of saturation: the real-robot success rate after post-training keeps improving as the model consumes more data or scales up during pre-training.

Applications

After post-training, Xiaomi-Robotics-1 can serve as a strong robot foundation model for downstream applications. We put Xiaomi-Robotics-1 to use in two complementary downstream settings. Efficient adaptation to new tasks specializes the model to brand-new, highly complex real-robot tasks from a few hours of data per task. Simulation benchmarks probe its capabilities in mainstream suites that emphasize generalization.

Xiaomi-Robotics-1 can learn new tasks with high data efficiency. The model picks up tasks like phone packing, printer refilling, laundry loading, and box packing from just a few hours of real-robot demonstrations per task. With an average of under 10 hours of demonstrations per task, it already reaches a 75% overall success rate, nearly doubling the π0.5 baseline (40%) at the same budget; raising the budget to an average of under 40 hours lifts overall success to 85%.

Task<10 h/task on average<40 h/task on average
XR-1oursπ0.5XR-1oursπ0.5
Phone Packing70308040
Printer Refilling70206020
Laundry Loading804010050
Box Packing8070100100
Overall75408553

Evaluation on efficient learning of new tasks. Each cell shows success rate (%), higher is better. XR-1 = Xiaomi-Robotics-1.

We evaluate Xiaomi-Robotics-1 on four mainstream simulation benchmarks. It achieves state-of-the-art results on all four benchmarks. The table reports the average success rate and the relative gain over second place. These results show that the generalization and scaling gains of Xiaomi-Robotics-1 carry over to standard simulation evaluation.

BenchmarkXR-1ours2nd BestRel. Gain
RoboCasa74.572.6+2.6%
RoboCasa36557.446.6+23.2%
VLABench59.153.2+11.1%
RoboDojo13.938.80+58.3%

Simulation evaluation. All benchmarks report average success rate (%). XR-1 = Xiaomi-Robotics-1; Rel. Gain = (XR-1 − 2nd best) / 2nd best. Higher is better.

Conclusion

Xiaomi-Robotics-1 demonstrates a practical path for scaling robot foundation models: large-scale embodiment-free UMI pre-training breaks the robot data bottleneck, while real-robot and instruction alignment transfer that general capability to physical robots. Results show that the model scales neatly with data volume and model size during pre-training, and that this scaling behavior translates directly to post-training, where a stronger pre-trained model yields better out-of-the-box real-robot performance in unseen environments. The resulting foundation model adapts to new tasks from minimal data and achieves state-of-the-art performance on four challenging simulation benchmarks that emphasize generalization.

Finally, we present an uncut footage of luggage packing.

  journal={arXiv preprint arXiv:2607.15330},
  year={2026}

sentences.en: Breaking the data barrier.
sentences.zh: 打破数据壁垒。

sentences.en: Scaling robot policy models with embodiment-free pre-training.
sentences.zh: 通过无实例预训练来扩展机器人策略模型。

blocks.html_en: Foundation models in language and vision keep moving the frontier by riding empirical scaling laws: capability tracks data, parameters, and compute. Robotics has missed out. sentences.en: Foundation models in language and vision keep moving the frontier by riding empirical scaling laws: capability tracks data, parameters, and compute.
sentences.zh: 语言和视觉方面的基础模型通过经验尺度法则不断推动前沿：能力跟踪数据、参数和计算。

sentences.en: Robotics has missed out.
sentences.zh: 机器人技术已经错过了。

sentences.en: Large-scale, high-quality data is hard to come by, and that scarcity, more than anything else, has capped how far policy models could scale.
sentences.zh: 大规模、高质量的数据很难获得，而这种数据的稀缺性最重要地限制了政策模型的扩展程度。

sentences.en: What robots can do under genuinely large-scale training remained largely an open question.
sentences.zh: 机器人在真正大规模的训练下能做什么在很大程度上仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。

sentences.en: We take a step toward answering it.
sentences.zh: 我们朝着回答这个问题迈出一步。

sentences.en: Xiaomi-Robotics-1 combines large-scale embodiment-free (UMI) pre-training with a modest amount of real-robot data in a post-training stage.
sentences.zh: 小米机器人1将大规模无实体（UMI）预训练与训练后阶段的少量真实机器人数据相结合。

sentences.en: We study how the model behaves as it scales.
sentences.zh: 我们研究模型在扩展时的行为方式。

For pre-training, we use 100,000 hours of embodiment-free (UMI) trajectories spanning more than 1,700 scenarios (household, commercial premises, industrial sites, and outdoor spaces), covering a diverse range of tasks. We develop a scalable auto-labeling pipeline that first divides trajectories into fixed-length segments and then annotates each segment with language descriptions of scene state transitions.

sentences.en: Everything Xiaomi-Robotics-1 can do starts from data.
sentences.zh: 小米机器人1能做的一切都从数据开始。

sentences.en: For pre-training, we use 100,000 hours of embodiment-free (UMI) trajectories spanning more than 1,700 scenarios (household, commercial premises, industrial sites, and outdoor spaces), covering a diverse range of tasks.
sentences.zh: 在预训练中，我们使用了 100,000 小时的无实体 (UMI) 轨迹，涵盖 1,700 多个场景（家庭、商业场所、工业场所和室外空间），涵盖了各种任务。

sentences.en: We develop a scalable auto-labeling pipeline that first divides trajectories into fixed-length segments and then annotates each segment with language descriptions of scene state transitions.
sentences.zh: 我们开发了一个可扩展的自动标记管道，首先将轨迹划分为固定长度的段，然后用场景状态转换的语言描述来注释每个段。

blocks.html_en: For post-training, we leverage cross-embodiment datasets containing in-house robot data, filtered open-sourced robot data, and a set of high-quality UMI data. For the in-house data, we collected over 7,200 hours of real-robot data in real homes, covering tasks like tidying a sofa, sorting a shoe cabinet, and putting away kitchenware. The UMI data are manually annotated with temporal segments and instruction prompts, which differ from the auto-labeled state-transition descriptions used in the pre-training data.

sentences.en: For post-training, we leverage cross-embodiment datasets containing in-house robot data, filtered open-sourced robot data, and a set of high-quality UMI data.
sentences.zh: 对于后期训练，我们利用包含内部机器人数据、过滤后的开源机器人数据和一组高质量 UMI 数据的跨实施例数据集。

sentences.en: For the in-house data, we collected over 7,200 hours of real-robot data in real homes, covering tasks like tidying a sofa, sorting a shoe cabinet, and putting away kitchenware.
sentences.zh: 对于内部数据，我们在真实家庭中收集了超过 7,200 个小时的真实机器人数据，涵盖了整理沙发、整理鞋柜、收拾厨具等任务。

sentences.en: The UMI data are manually annotated with temporal segments and instruction prompts, which differ from the auto-labeled state-transition descriptions used in the pre-training data.
sentences.zh: UMI 数据是用时间段和指令提示手动注释的，这与预训练数据中使用的自动标记的状态转换描述不同。

sentences.en: Method
sentences.zh: 方法

blocks.html_en: Following the training paradigm of LLMs, the training of Xiaomi-Robotics-1 consists of two stages: pre-training and post-training. The first stage learns general representations for action generation from large-scale UMI data, while the post-training stage aligns the model with real robot embodiments and instruction-following capabilities.

sentences.en: Following the training paradigm of LLMs, the training of Xiaomi-Robotics-1 consists of two stages: pre-training and post-training.
sentences.zh: 遵循LLM的训练范式，Xiaomi-Robotics-1的训练分为两个阶段：预训练和后训练。

sentences.en: The first stage learns general representations for action generation from large-scale UMI data, while the post-training stage aligns the model with real robot embodiments and instruction-following capabilities.
sentences.zh: 第一阶段从大规模 UMI 数据中学习动作生成的一般表示，而后训练阶段使模型与真实的机器人实施例和指令跟踪功能保持一致。

blocks.html_en: Pre-training is about breadth: exposing the model to as much of the real world as possible. We use the embodiment-free UMI data described above, which spans a broad range of environments and tasks. At this scale, manual labeling is infeasible. Thus, we built an automatic annotation pipeline powered by a strong vision-language model. Long videos are split into fixed-length clips, and the VLM describes the state transition of grippers and interacting objects within each clip. The result is a large-scale corpus of real-world manipulation trajectories, each annotated with precise language descriptions. These allow the model to learn action generation that drives the scene toward the state transitions described by the language.

sentences.en: Pre-training is about breadth: exposing the model to as much of the real world as possible.
sentences.zh: 预训练涉及广度：将模型尽可能多地暴露在现实世界中。

sentences.en: We use the embodiment-free UMI data described above, which spans a broad range of environments and tasks.
sentences.zh: 我们使用上述的无实施例的 UMI 数据，它涵盖了广泛的环境和任务。

sentences.en: At this scale, manual labeling is infeasible.
sentences.zh: 在这种规模下，手动标记是不可行的。

sentences.en: Thus, we built an automatic annotation pipeline powered by a strong vision-language model.
sentences.zh: 因此，我们构建了一个由强大的视觉语言模型提供支持的自动注释管道。

sentences.en: Long videos are split into fixed-length clips, and the VLM describes the state transition of grippers and interacting objects within each clip.
sentences.zh: 长视频被分割成固定长度的剪辑，VLM 描述每个剪辑中夹具和交互对象的状态转换。

sentences.en: The result is a large-scale corpus of real-world manipulation trajectories, each annotated with precise language descriptions.
sentences.zh: 结果是一个大规模的现实世界操作轨迹语料库，每个轨迹都用精确的语言描述进行了注释。

sentences.en: These allow the model to learn action generation that drives the scene toward the state transitions described by the language.
sentences.zh: 这些允许模型学习动作生成，从而驱动场景向语言描述的状态转换。

blocks.html_en: An encouraging finding is that pre-training shows a clean scaling behavior: as data and model size grow, validation action error steadily decreases.

sentences.en: An encouraging finding is that pre-training shows a clean scaling behavior: as data and model size grow, validation action error steadily decreases.
sentences.zh: 一个令人鼓舞的发现是，预训练显示出干净的扩展行为：随着数据和模型大小的增长，验证操作误差稳步下降。

blocks.html_en: Post-training aims to align the strong action-generation capabilities acquired from pre-training with real robot embodiments and natural-language instruction following along two axes. Embodiment alignment uses high-quality cross-embodiment real-robot data to map the general action-generation ability onto actual robots. Instruction alignment shifts the model from "generating actions given a description of scene state transitions" to "understanding a natural-language instruction and executing it directly."

sentences.en: Post-training aims to align the strong action-generation capabilities acquired from pre-training with real robot embodiments and natural-language instruction following along two axes.
sentences.zh: 后训练的目的是将预训练中获得的强大动作生成能力与真实的机器人实施例和沿两个轴遵循的自然语言指令结合起来。

sentences.en: Embodiment alignment uses high-quality cross-embodiment real-robot data to map the general action-generation ability onto actual robots.
sentences.zh: 实施例对齐使用高质量的跨实施例真实机器人数据将一般动作生成能力映射到实际机器人上。

sentences.en: Instruction alignment shifts the model from "generating actions given a description of scene state transitions" to "understanding a natural-language instruction and executing it directly."
sentences.zh: 指令对齐将模型从“根据场景状态转换的描述生成动作”转变为“理解自然语言指令并直接执行它”。

blocks.html_en: After post-training, Xiaomi-Robotics-1 can be used out-of-the-box to perform a wide range of mobile manipulation tasks in the real world. We evaluate the post-trained model in unseen environments with unseen object instances to understand whether the scaling behaviors from pre-training can transfer to real-robot performance after post-training.

sentences.en: After post-training, Xiaomi-Robotics-1 can be used out-of-the-box to perform a wide range of mobile manipulation tasks in the real world.
sentences.zh: 经过后期训练后，Xiaomi-Robotics-1 可以开箱即用地在现实世界中执行各种移动操作任务。

sentences.en: We evaluate the post-trained model in unseen environments with unseen object instances to understand whether the scaling behaviors from pre-training can transfer to real-robot performance after post-training.
sentences.zh: 我们在未见过的环境中使用未见过的对象实例评估训练后的模型，以了解预训练的缩放行为是否可以在训练后转移到真实的机器人性能。

blocks.html_en: The answer is yes. As we increase the amount of pre-training data and model size, real-robot success rate rises steadily and predictably. That is, a stronger pre-trained model yields better real-robot performance. The scaling gains show no signs of saturation: the real-robot success rate after post-training keeps improving as the model consumes more data or scales up during pre-training.

sentences.en: The answer is yes.
sentences.zh: 答案是肯定的。

sentences.en: As we increase the amount of pre-training data and model size, real-robot success rate rises steadily and predictably.
sentences.zh: 随着我们增加预训练数据量和模型大小，真实机器人的成功率会稳定且可预测地上升。

sentences.en: That is, a stronger pre-trained model yields better real-robot performance.
sentences.zh: 也就是说，更强的预训练模型可以产生更好的真实机器人性能。

sentences.en: The scaling gains show no signs of saturation: the real-robot success rate after post-training keeps improving as the model consumes more data or scales up during pre-training.
sentences.zh: 缩放增益没有显示出饱和的迹象：随着模型在预训练期间消耗更多数据或扩大规模，训练后的真实机器人成功率不断提高。

sentences.en: Applications
sentences.zh: 应用领域

blocks.html_en: After post-training, Xiaomi-Robotics-1 can serve as a strong robot foundation model for downstream applications. We put Xiaomi-Robotics-1 to use in two complementary downstream settings. Efficient adaptation to new tasks specializes the model to brand-new, highly complex real-robot tasks from a few hours of data per task. Simulation benchmarks probe its capabilities in mainstream suites that emphasize generalization.

sentences.en: After post-training, Xiaomi-Robotics-1 can serve as a strong robot foundation model for downstream applications.
sentences.zh: 经过后期训练后，Xiaomi-Robotics-1可以作为下游应用的强大机器人基础模型。

sentences.en: We put Xiaomi-Robotics-1 to use in two complementary downstream settings.
sentences.zh: 我们将Xiaomi-Robotics-1用于两个互补的下游设置。

sentences.en: Efficient adaptation to new tasks specializes the model to brand-new, highly complex real-robot tasks from a few hours of data per task.
sentences.zh: 对新任务的有效适应使模型从每个任务几个小时的数据中专门适应全新的、高度复杂的真实机器人任务。

sentences.en: Simulation benchmarks probe its capabilities in mainstream suites that emphasize generalization.
sentences.zh: 模拟基准测试其在强调泛化的主流套件中的功能。

blocks.html_en: Xiaomi-Robotics-1 can learn new tasks with high data efficiency. The model picks up tasks like phone packing, printer refilling, laundry loading, and box packing from just a few hours of real-robot demonstrations per task. With an average of under 10 hours of demonstrations per task, it already reaches a 75% overall success rate, nearly doubling the π0.5 baseline (40%) at the same budget; raising the budget to an average of under 40 hours lifts overall success to 85%.

sentences.en: Xiaomi-Robotics-1 can learn new tasks with high data efficiency.
sentences.zh: 小米-Robotics-1可以以高数据效率学习新任务。

sentences.en: The model picks up tasks like phone packing, printer refilling, laundry loading, and box packing from just a few hours of real-robot demonstrations per task.
sentences.zh: 该模型只需对每个任务进行几个小时的真实机器人演示，即可完成电话包装、打印机重新填充、衣物装载和包装箱等任务。

sentences.en: With an average of under 10 hours of demonstrations per task, it already reaches a 75% overall success rate, nearly doubling the π0.5 baseline (40%) at the same budget; raising the budget to an average of under 40 hours lifts overall success to 85%.
sentences.zh: 每个任务的演示时间平均不到 10 小时，总体成功率已达到 75%，在相同预算下几乎是 π0.5 基线 (40%) 的两倍；将预算提高到平均 40 小时以下可以将总体成功率提高到 85%。

blocks.html_en: We evaluate Xiaomi-Robotics-1 on four mainstream simulation benchmarks. It achieves state-of-the-art results on all four benchmarks. The table reports the average success rate and the relative gain over second place. These results show that the generalization and scaling gains of Xiaomi-Robotics-1 carry over to standard simulation evaluation.

blocks.html_en: Xiaomi-Robotics-1 demonstrates a practical path for scaling robot foundation models: large-scale embodiment-free UMI pre-training breaks the robot data bottleneck, while real-robot and instruction alignment transfer that general capability to physical robots. Results show that the model scales neatly with data volume and model size during pre-training, and that this scaling behavior translates directly to post-training, where a stronger pre-trained model yields better out-of-the-box real-robot performance in unseen environments. The resulting foundation model adapts to new tasks from minimal data and achieves state-of-the-art performance on four challenging simulation benchmarks that emphasize generalization.

sentences.en: Xiaomi-Robotics-1 demonstrates a practical path for scaling robot foundation models: large-scale embodiment-free UMI pre-training breaks the robot data bottleneck, while real-robot and instruction alignment transfer that general capability to physical robots.
sentences.zh: 小米机器人一号展示了一种扩展机器人基础模型的实用路径：大规模无实体UMI预训练打破了机器人数据瓶颈，而真实机器人和指令对齐则将通用能力转移到了物理机器人上。

sentences.en: Results show that the model scales neatly with data volume and model size during pre-training, and that this scaling behavior translates directly to post-training, where a stronger pre-trained model yields better out-of-the-box real-robot performance in unseen environments.
sentences.zh: 结果表明，模型在预训练期间随数据量和模型大小进行灵活缩放，并且这种缩放行为直接转化为训练后，其中更强大的预训练模型可以在未见的环境中产生更好的开箱即用的真实机器人性能。

sentences.en: The resulting foundation model adapts to new tasks from minimal data and achieves state-of-the-art performance on four challenging simulation benchmarks that emphasize generalization.
sentences.zh: 由此产生的基础模型可以用最少的数据适应新任务，并在四个强调泛化的具有挑战性的模拟基准上实现最先进的性能。

sentences.en: Citation
sentences.zh: 引文

content_html_zh:
打破数据壁垒。 通过无实例预训练来扩展机器人策略模型。

语言和视觉方面的基础模型通过经验尺度法则不断推动前沿：能力跟踪数据、参数和计算。 机器人技术已经错过了。 大规模、高质量的数据很难获得，而这种数据的稀缺性最重要地限制了政策模型的扩展程度。 机器人在真正大规模的训练下能做什么在很大程度上仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。 我们朝着回答这个问题迈出一步。 小米机器人1将大规模无实体（UMI）预训练与训练后阶段的少量真实机器人数据相结合。 我们研究模型在扩展时的行为方式。

Data

小米机器人1能做的一切都从数据开始。 在预训练中，我们使用了 100,000 小时的无实体 (UMI) 轨迹，涵盖 1,700 多个场景（家庭、商业场所、工业场所和室外空间），涵盖了各种任务。 我们开发了一个可扩展的自动标记管道，首先将轨迹划分为固定长度的段，然后用场景状态转换的语言描述来注释每个段。

对于后期训练，我们利用包含内部机器人数据、过滤后的开源机器人数据和一组高质量 UMI 数据的跨实施例数据集。 对于内部数据，我们在真实家庭中收集了超过 7,200 个小时的真实机器人数据，涵盖了整理沙发、整理鞋柜、收拾厨具等任务。 UMI 数据是用时间段和指令提示手动注释的，这与预训练数据中使用的自动标记的状态转换描述不同。

方法

遵循LLM的训练范式，Xiaomi-Robotics-1的训练分为两个阶段：预训练和后训练。 第一阶段从大规模 UMI 数据中学习动作生成的一般表示，而后训练阶段使模型与真实的机器人实施例和指令跟踪功能保持一致。

预训练涉及广度：将模型尽可能多地暴露在现实世界中。 我们使用上述的无实施例的 UMI 数据，它涵盖了广泛的环境和任务。 在这种规模下，手动标记是不可行的。 因此，我们构建了一个由强大的视觉语言模型提供支持的自动注释管道。 长视频被分割成固定长度的剪辑，VLM 描述每个剪辑中夹具和交互对象的状态转换。 结果是一个大规模的现实世界操作轨迹语料库，每个轨迹都用精确的语言描述进行了注释。 这些允许模型学习动作生成，从而驱动场景向语言描述的状态转换。

一个令人鼓舞的发现是，预训练显示出干净的扩展行为：随着数据和模型大小的增长，验证操作误差稳步下降。

后训练的目的是将预训练中获得的强大动作生成能力与真实的机器人实施例和沿两个轴遵循的自然语言指令结合起来。 实施例对齐使用高质量的跨实施例真实机器人数据将一般动作生成能力映射到实际机器人上。 指令对齐将模型从“根据场景状态转换的描述生成动作”转变为“理解自然语言指令并直接执行它”。

经过后期训练后，Xiaomi-Robotics-1 可以开箱即用地在现实世界中执行各种移动操作任务。 我们在未见过的环境中使用未见过的对象实例评估训练后的模型，以了解预训练的缩放行为是否可以在训练后转移到真实的机器人性能。

答案是肯定的。 随着我们增加预训练数据量和模型大小，真实机器人的成功率会稳定且可预测地上升。 也就是说，更强的预训练模型可以产生更好的真实机器人性能。 缩放增益没有显示出饱和的迹象：随着模型在预训练期间消耗更多数据或扩大规模，训练后的真实机器人成功率不断提高。

应用领域

经过后期训练后，Xiaomi-Robotics-1可以作为下游应用的强大机器人基础模型。 我们将Xiaomi-Robotics-1用于两个互补的下游设置。 对新任务的有效适应使模型从每个任务几个小时的数据中专门适应全新的、高度复杂的真实机器人任务。 模拟基准测试其在强调泛化的主流套件中的功能。

小米-Robotics-1可以以高数据效率学习新任务。 该模型只需对每个任务进行几个小时的真实机器人演示，即可完成电话包装、打印机重新填充、衣物装载和包装箱等任务。 每个任务的演示时间平均不到 10 小时，总体成功率已达到 75%，在相同预算下几乎是 π0.5 基线 (40%) 的两倍；将预算提高到平均 40 小时以下可以将总体成功率提高到 85%。

Task平均 <10 小时/任务平均 <40 小时/任务
XR-1我们π0.5XR-1我们π0.5
手机包装70308040
打印机补充70206020
洗衣装载804010050
盒装8070100100
全面的75408553

新任务的有效学习评估。 每个单元格显示成功率（%），越高越好。 XR-1 = 小米机器人-1。

我们在四个主流模拟基准上评估小米-Robotics-1。 它在所有四个基准测试中均取得了最先进的结果。 该表报告了平均成功率以及相对第二名的相对增益。 这些结果表明，Xiaomi-Robotics-1 的泛化和扩展增益可以延续到标准模拟评估中。

基准XR-1我们第二名相对。 获得
机器人之家74.572.6+2.6%
机器人之家36557.446.6+23.2%
VLA基准59.153.2+11.1%
机器人道场13.938.80+58.3%

模拟评估。 所有基准均报告平均成功率 (%)。 XR-1 = 小米机器人-1；相对。 增益 = (XR-1 − 第二最佳) / 第二最佳。 越高越好。

结论

小米机器人一号展示了一种扩展机器人基础模型的实用路径：大规模无实体UMI预训练打破了机器人数据瓶颈，而真实机器人和指令对齐则将通用能力转移到了物理机器人上。 结果表明，模型在预训练期间随数据量和模型大小进行灵活缩放，并且这种缩放行为直接转化为训练后，其中更强大的预训练模型可以在未见的环境中产生更好的开箱即用的真实机器人性能。 由此产生的基础模型可以用最少的数据适应新任务，并在四个强调泛化的具有挑战性的模拟基准上实现最先进的性能。

最后，我们展示了一段未剪辑的行李打包镜头。
